TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kenuy ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,351 buwan, 5,974 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 597 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 5,377 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 7%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kenuy hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kenuy hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kenuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kenuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kenuy hya' ga Lasutan. tay mkyahu' na Kenuy hya' ga Cipawkan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kenuj …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu kariŇč s~…ēi, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *,*** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē *%, ő≤unun *%, truku *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a las~…ēutan. taj mkjańßu Ē na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ipawkan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Kenuy ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,351 buwan, 5,974 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 597 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 5,377 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 7%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kenuy hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kenuy hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kenuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kenuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kenuy hya' ga Lasutan. tay mkyahu' na Kenuy hya' ga Cipawkan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kenuj …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu kariŇč s~…ēi, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *,*** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē *%, ő≤unun *%, truku *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a las~…ēutan. taj mkjańßu Ē na kenuj ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ipawkan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
